scripts.build: npm run build -w @runebrawl/shared && npm run build -w @runebrawl/game-content && npm run build -w @runebrawl/server && npm run build -w @runebrawl/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @runebrawl/shared && npm run typecheck -w @runebrawl/game-content && npm run typecheck -w @runebrawl/server && npm run typecheck -w @runebrawl/client
